summary: Hair-first Steve who matured into the archive's cleanest babysitter-warrior redemption arc.
synopsis: An excellent hairline turned unexpected babysitter and mall-war hero.
editorialBlurb: Steve Harrington starts as a suspiciously polished teen-bully silhouette and evolves into one of the cleanest redemptive Steve arcs of recent television. The hair gets the headlines, but the real mechanism is usefulness: he keeps showing up, taking hits, and stabilizing chaos with surprising sincerity.
whyItMatters: He is a modern proof-of-concept for the Steve redemption arc and one of the strongest mainstream examples of a Steve becoming more beloved over time.
appearanceContext: Recurring across the core series, with the later seasons sharpening his babysitter-war-horse role.
sourceNotes: Appears across the full core run of Stranger Things.
